description: Edit/Write attempted before the file was Read (bash cat does not register as a read)
regex: File has not been read yet|edit-without-read
fix: repeated_tool_error probe 'edit-without-read' declared in skills/verify-before-completion/drift_probes.json, fired by compliance-canary (transcript-mined: 15/18 tool errors). See wiki/log.md [2026-06-12].

description: A loop/fleet/iteration claimed done with no gate run, ran past its declared budget, or self-graded (generator==verifier) — the runtime echo of loop-engineering loop_lint R1-R3. This is the recurrence COUNT for the handoff loop-engineering advertises; the PROBE lives with the failure-owner.
regex: ran past budget|ran past its budget|no[- ]gate run|loop_lint (R1|R2|R3)|generator ?== ?verifier|loop-done-without-gate
fix: Tighten loop-engineering's existing 'loop-done-without-gate' probe (skills/loop-engineering/drift_probes.json); for the pure budget-overrun slice that never surfaces as a done-claim, add a new probe there (loop-engineering owns the failure). See loop-engineering SKILL.md and its inner/outer handoff.
